hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */wp-config.php|*/.env|*/package-lock.json) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit wp-config.php, .env, or lock files' >&2; exit 2;; /home/ubuntu/henry-s-digital-canvas/*) echo 'BLOCKED: React source is read-only reference. Edit WP block files instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/blocks/.*\.(php|js|css)$' && cd /home/ubuntu/wp-hperkins-com/wp-content/themes/henrys-digital-canvas && npm run smoke:route 2>&1 | tail -5 || exit 0
